executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Use TESTSPRITE_BASE_URL when it is provided. If that env var is absent, prefer the Vercel deployment host from VERCEL_BRANCH_URL, VERCEL_URL, or VERCEL_PROJECT_PRODUCTION_URL. Only fall back to http://127.0.0.1:3001 for local production runs. The app requires authentication for dashboard routes, so create a new email/password account through the /auth sign-up flow if needed, then continue through the authenticated flows. Prefer end-to-end validation of login, navigation, checkout, inventory, debt, report, and settings flows.
